strings.noTrackLoaded: WAITING! WAITING! WHY ARE WE WAITING?!
strings.dragDrop: THROW IT IN! THROW IT IN RIGHT NOW!!
strings.idle: BOUNCING OFF THE WALLS! GIVE ME A BEAT!
strings.paused: NOOOOO! WHY DID WE STOP?! GO-GO-GO!
strings.stopped: SADNESS! THE ENERGY IS GONE! REBOOT!!
strings.loaded: BOOM! IT'S HERE! IT'S READY! PLAY IT!
strings.playBlocked: CLICK ME! CLICK ME! CLICK ME! AGH!
strings.shuffleOff: BORING ORDER! BUT OKAY! LETS MOVE!
strings.importTheme: GIVE ME NEW COLORS! MORE NEON!
strings.invalidThemeFile: UGY! YUCK! WRONG FORMAT! FIX IT!
strings.uploadAudio: SAVE IT! BLAST IT TO THE CLOUD!
strings.designedIn: MADE IN A WIND TUNNEL AT MACH 5!
strings.rewindTitle: REWIND! DO IT AGAIN! (Shift: -10s, Ctrl: THE START!!)
strings.forwardTitle: SKIP! SKIP! SKIP! (Shift: +10s, Ctrl: THE END!!)
strings.clearCacheTitle: 🚨 THE ULTIMATE UNIVERSE-ENDING KABOOM: ARE YOU FOR REAL?! IF YOU CLICK THIS, EVERYTHING EXPLODES! THE COLORS! THE WORDS! THE BEATS! IT'S LIKE THE ENTIRE GALAXY IS BEING SUCKED INTO A SUPER-POWERED VACUUM CLEANER AND TURNED INTO CONFETTI! EVERYTHING YOU LOVE WILL BE GONE IN A MILLISECOND! ARE WE REALLY BLOWING IT ALL UP?! 🚨
